about.heading: From vision to virtual reality
about.subheading: At Build360, we do more than take photos. We build an immersive digital strategy. Here is our process to transform your spaces into high-performing sales tools in Morocco.

steps.title: 1. Audit & Strategy
steps.text: We study your space and your business objectives to define the most profitable type of virtual tour for you.

steps.title: 2. UX Storyboarding
steps.text: We design a smooth user journey. Selection of strategic viewpoints and interactive interface design.

steps.title: 3. Capture & Tech
steps.text: 4K digitisation with Matterport or Laser technology. Digital twin creation and integration of your media (tags, videos).

steps.title: 4. Deployment & Monitoring
steps.text: Integration on your website, Google Maps and social networks. Team training and visit statistics tracking.

aboutSection.subheading: Stand out from the competition with immersive technology. Build360 transforms your spaces (real estate, showrooms, hotels) into interactive experiences accessible anywhere in the world.
aboutSection.readyText: Ready to transform your spaces into immersive experiences?

services.title: Virtual Tour for Real Estate
services.description: Accelerate your property sales. Allow your clients to visit apartments, villas and offices without travelling. Our HD virtual tours offer total transparency, filter casual visitors and trigger remote love-at-first-sight moments.

services.title: Valorisation of Riads and Hotels
services.description: Reassure future clients before booking. Offer total immersion in your hotel or Riad. A 360° tour increases reservation rates and improves your visibility on Google Maps and Booking.

services.title: Virtual Showrooms & Industry
services.description: Digitalise your point of sale. Whether you are a factory, school or shop, extend the customer experience beyond opening hours with an interactive digital twin.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Find answers to the most common questions about our virtual tour services in Morocco.

items.question: What is the price of a virtual tour in Morocco?
items.answer: The price depends on the area (m²) and the features requested. At Build360, we offer solutions adapted to studios and large factories alike. Contact us for a custom quote within 24h.

items.question: Which cities do you operate in?
items.answer: Our team travels throughout Morocco for the digitalisation of your spaces, including Casablanca, Rabat, Marrakech, Tangier, Agadir and Fez.

items.question: Are the tours compatible on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, all our Build360 experiences are 100% responsive and work on smartphones, tablets, computers and virtual reality headsets (VR).

footer.description: Specialist in 3D digitalisation and virtual tours. We transform your spaces into immersive experiences with cutting-edge Matterport technology.
